basic_details.job_title: ICMR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 16 Faculty Positions Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) Faculty Positions (Medical) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website www.icmr.gov.in. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR Faculty Positions (Medical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts. Age relaxation is applicable for Government servants/SC/ST/OBC & PwBD in accordance with Central Government instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS (recognized under IMC Act 1956), Post Graduate Degree in concerned specialty/super-specialty, Teaching experience as per post (3/5/12 years)
qualification.details: Professor (Medical): MBBS + PG Degree (DM Cardiology / MCh CTVS / MD Psychiatry or equivalent) + 12 years standing with 4 years as Associate Professor Associate Professor (Medical): MBBS + PG Degree (DM Neurology / DM Cardiology / MCh Urology / MD Radio-diagnosis or equivalent) + 5 years experience with 2 years as Assistant Professor Assistant Professor (Medical): MBBS + PG Degree (MCh CTVS / DM Cardiology / DM Medical Gastroenterology / DM Nephrology / DM Neurology / MD Tuberculosis & Respiratory Diseases / MD Immuno Haematology & Blood Transfusion / MD Radio-diagnosis / MD Psychiatry or equivalent) + 3 years teaching experience as Senior Resident

salary_details.details: Professor (Medical): Rs. 123100 - 215900 (Level-13) Per Month Associate Professor (Medical): Rs. 78800 - 209200 (Level-12) Per Month Assistant Professor (Medical): Rs. 67700 - 208700 (Level-11) Per Month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility and criteria Personal Discussion / Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICMR Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the ICMR Faculty Positions (Medical) is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Faculty Positions at ICMR?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies for Faculty Positions (Medical) released by the Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for ICMR Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a Post Graduate Degree in the concerned specialty/super-specialty, and relevant teaching experience as specified for each post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to ICMR Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Faculty Positions (Medical) at ICMR is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for ICMR Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1500 for General and OBC categories. SC, ST, and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for ICMR Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 67,700 to Rs. 2,15,900 per month, depending on the specific post and its level (Level-11, 12, or 13).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ICMR Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility and criteria, followed by a Personal Discussion or Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Madhya Pradesh apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification mentions the city as Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. While the primary location is Bhopal, candidates from other states are generally eligible to apply if they meet all other criteria.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any relaxation in age for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for Government servants, SC/ST, OBC, and PwBD candidates in accordance with the Central Government's instructions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also visit the official ICMR website.
